name: @lyupro/skillforge-mcp
description: Universal Skills MCP server — load Markdown skills from arbitrary folders, lazy-by-design, cross-tool (Claude Code / Codex CLI / any MCP client).

tools.name: skills__list
tools.description: Enumerate available skills (metadata only). Filters: folder, search, source, folderTag (keeps skills under folders carrying that tag).

tools.name: skills__get
tools.description: Retrieve the full content (body + metadata) of a named skill.

tools.name: skills__invoke
tools.description: Invoke a skill by name, forwarding optional input. Composite skills (metadata.skills) walk nested skills sequentially with DFS cycle detection. Pipeline: Logging → Timeout → Cache → strategy (Prompt / Script / Hybrid).

tools.name: skills__configure
tools.description: Manage configured skill folders, blacklist, and reset to defaults. Actions: add_folder (optionally with a kebab-case alias), remove_folder, list_folders, set_blacklist, get_blacklist, reset. Persists to the platform config path.

tools.name: skills__reload
tools.description: Force a full rescan of all configured folders. Returns { loaded, added, removed, errors } diff against the previous registry snapshot.

SKILLFORGE_FOLDERS.description: Override folder list (path-separator: ':' POSIX, ';' Windows). When set, overrides persisted folders[] entirely.

SKILLFORGE_TTL_MS.description: Metadata cache TTL in ms. Default 300000 (5 min).
